Wait. But @CGasparino said oil would be $40 a barrel and we would all be swimming in cash


Furkan Gözükara (@FurkanGozukara)

The global energy market is about to face a massive shock. The Ras Laffan complex in Qatar which supplies 20 percent of the world's LNG has been hit. Europe is heavily dependent on this supply. The damage could disrupt global gas supplies for years.

You are a liar @KenCuccinelli @libsoftiktok. The bill says no such thing. Y’all clearly can’t read


Ken Cuccinelli II (@KenCuccinelli)

This bill doesn't need #DOJ... virtually any white supplier could sue and it's a laydown.

Discrimination is discrimination. And its wrong.

But a Democrat legislature voting this bill out does firmly establish that they are racists.
